subject: Bump kubernetes client to 1.12.3
commit_message:
Bump kubernetes client to 1.12.3

Bumping up the kubernetes client library used
to kubernetes 1.12.3
We will move it to v10.0.0 once our k8s deployment
moves to 1.13.0
Bumping kubectl version to 1.12.2 as andrewrothstein/ansible-kubectl
does not have 1.12.3 in its main.yml

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-301
Change-Id: Ifb2eaecb794bfdec19d631fdc9ece051d5ebfc60
Signed-off-by: Kiran Kamineni <kiran.k.kamineni@intel.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Hey Kiran, 

I'm testing this change using the KRD but it seems like it's affecting the Virtlet ansible tasks. I seems like the Virtlet plugin is not valid in 1.12 version(https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/extend-kubectl/kubectl-plugins/) and breaks the installation(https://github.com/onap/multicloud-k8s/blob/master/vagrant/playbooks/configure-virtlet.yml#L130-L131). I have a solution for this.

    installer: TASK [create Virtlet k8s objects] **********************************************
    installer: Thursday 03 January 2019  13:49:08 +0000 (0:00:00.431)       0:01:44.923 ****** 
    installer: fatal: [localhost]: FAILED! => {"changed": true, "cmd": "/usr/local/bin/kubectl plugin virt gen | /usr/local/bin/kubectl apply -f -", "delta": "0:00:01.434493", "end": "2019-01-03 13:49:10.075493", "msg": "non-zero return code", "rc": 1, "start": "2019-01-03 13:49:08.641000", "stderr": "error: unknown command \"virt gen\"\nSee 'kubectl plugin -h' for help and examples.\nerror: no objects passed to apply", "stderr_lines": ["error: unknown command \"virt gen\"", "See 'kubectl plugin -h' for help and examples.", "error: no objects passed to apply"], "stdout": "", "stdout_lines": []}
    installer: ...ignoring
    installer: 
    installer: TASK [wait for Virtlet daemonset] **********************************************
    installer: Thursday 03 January 2019  13:49:10 +0000 (0:00:01.740)       0:01:46.664 ****** 
    installer: fatal: [localhost]: FAILED! => {"attempts": 1, "changed": true, "cmd": "/usr/local/bin/kubectl get ds virtlet -n=kube-system -o=jsonpath --template={.status.numberReady}", "delta": "0:00:00.358327", "end": "2019-01-03 13:49:10.816155", "msg": "non-zero return code", "rc": 1, "start": "2019-01-03 13:49:10.457828", "stderr": "Error from server (NotFound): daemonsets.extensions \"virtlet\" not found", "stderr_lines": ["Error from server (NotFound): daemonsets.extensions \"virtlet\" not found"], "stdout": "", "stdout_lines": []}
    installer:  to retry, use: --limit @/home/vagrant/multicloud-k8s/vagrant/playbooks/configure-virtlet.retry
    installer: 
    installer: PLAY RECAP *********************************************************************
    installer: localhost                  : ok=14   changed=10   unreachable=0    failed=1

Patch Set 2:

Looks like we might need 1.4.3 of the virtlet plugin which adds support for kubernetes v1.12 according to their release notes.
